violations.text: The printed menus are lacking an allergen statement for consumers to notify staff if they or anyone in their party has a food allergy. Per PIC, establishment is changing menus and will add allergen statement to menus during reprint. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2025

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a sanitizer bucket in the sink basin. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Sanitizer bucket was moved during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025

The hand-washing sink in the server's area was blocked by a dish drying rack. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. The dish drying rack was moved during the time of inspection. Establishment is to find a new location for equipment so that it is not blocking access to the hand sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025

Raw animal foods (such as raw pork loin) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cooked pork ribs) in the outdoor walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Raw food items were rearranged during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher in the server's/ bar area was 25 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC called for service during the time of inspection. Establishment is to sanitize all equipment and dishes in sanitizing bay of 3-bay sink until unit is repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025

Hamburgers and ribeye steaks are served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. Per PIC, establishment is switching out menus and will add consumer advisory to menu during reprint. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2025

The pizza station does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Establishment is still installing equipment for pizza station. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

The door to the outside, located by the handicap restroom, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 2-door reach-in and walk-in cooler. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
